analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The current theme is dark and cosmic, but it needs to be enhanced with more animated objects, slides, and a cohesive black hole theme. The CSS file should include animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file should have a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon and interactive planets. The JavaScript file should fix syntax errors and ensure all functions are properly implemented.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices. Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
